name: cooperage
summary: A cooper's workshop for building barrels. Stave horses, a hooping fire for shaping iron bands, finished barrels stacked floor to ceiling, a master at the hoop-driver.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: rectangle with hooping fire at one end, finished goods at the other

accent.purpose: scorched zone around the hooping fire

story_prompts: brewery contract — 50 barrels due by week's end, every station moving
hooping failure — fire too hot, a stave charred, master cursing
quiet apprentice day — master absent, apprentice practicing bands alone
midnight smuggling — barrels stacked in rows, one with a false bottom

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: warm working light (0.4) with hooping-fire glow

anti_patterns: finished barrels stack along walls, never block the door or fire approach
hooping fire on a stone hearth — never on wooden planks
stave horses need swing-room for the adze — don't crowd them
